# mavitrine.github.io

**Generated — do not edit here.**

This repo is a publish target. Its contents are mirrored from `site/` in the
private source repo (`NeWbLt123/mavitrine`) by `scripts/deploy-site`, which
force-syncs and overwrites. Any change made directly in this repo is lost on
the next deploy.

Edit the site there, open a PR there, then run the deploy script.

Published from source commit `4bfda4c`.
